World War Z (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $202,706,711Details
International Box Office $329,154,939
Worldwide Box Office $531,861,650
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $23,281,808
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $31,505,222
Total $54,787,030
Further financial details...

Synopsis

United Nations employee Gerry Lane traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$66,411,834 (32.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$190,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,607 opening theaters/3,607 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $298,098,371

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 21st, 2013 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 19th, 2013 (Wide) (Egypt)
June 21st, 2013 (Wide) (South Korea)
Video Release: September 17th, 2013 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense frightening zombie sequences, violence and disturbing images.
(Rating bulletin 2269, 4/24/2013)
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: World War Z
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Filming location (country): England, Hungary, Malta, United Kingdom
Geographical setting: Israel, Philadelphia
Plot point: Escape, Political, Zombies
Social setting: Dystopia, Epidemic, Post Apocalypse
Source material: Novel or Other Work Adapted by Author
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Skydance Productions, Hemisphere Media Capital, GK Films, Plan B Entertainment, 2Dux2
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

United Nations employee Gerry Lane traverses the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.
